creator: jbtakk@iherebuywisely.com
text:
rtwn0, wlan0...
upgrade from Nov 2021 to 3 15 2022 buildworld buildkernel
cycle results in wpa_supplicant, service netif start, etc
suddenly not completing....

a -dd verbose run of wpa_supplicant includes messages about SSID errors and IOCTL  or something that is all beyond my expertise.

I've not tried with another usb besides rtwn0

So it could be a usb issue, an SSL issue, a coding issue,...

I put 'affects some people' because it is replicated on two installs here.
